issues.message: Stranded lock directory "D:\CLAUDE\Project\unified-crm-finance\.gsd.lock" exists but no live process holds the session lock. This blocks new auto-mode sessions from starting.
Found .gsd.migrating — a previous external state migration failed. State may be incomplete.
Docker is installed but daemon is not running — Start Docker Desktop or the docker daemon
Directory "parallel-research" exists in M001/slices/ but is not referenced in the roadmap
Task T05 has 3 must-haves but summary addresses only 2

summary: 2 errors, 4 warnings · 9 fixed · Stranded lock directory "D:\CLAUDE\Project\unified-crm-finance\.gsd.lock" exists but no live process holds the session lock. This blocks new auto-mode sessions from starting.
